Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER (AS TO M & R WINE AND SPIRITS INC DBA SAN RAMON VALLEY WINE & SPIRITS) IS Granted as to defendants M&R Wine and Spirits, Inc. and Major S. Bains, individually as personal guarantor of M&R Wine and Spirits, Inc., in total requested amount of $10,389.41, less $900 for estimated 3 hours not spent on reply or hearing attendance, for total of $9,489.41.
